---
title: "Research"
description: "" 
listing:
  - id: unpublished-papers
    include: 
      type: "Working"
    contents: papers.yaml
    template: papers.ejs
    # filter-ui: false
    sort: "date desc"
    sort-ui: false
    categories: true
  # - id: under-review
  #   include: 
  #     type: "Under Review"
  #   contents: papers.yaml
  #   template: papers.ejs
  #   # filter-ui: false
  #   sort: "date desc"
  #   sort-ui: false
  #   categories: true  
  - id: published-papers
    include: 
      type: "Published"
    contents: papers.yaml
    template: papers.ejs
    # filter-ui: true
    sort: "date desc" 
    sort-ui: false
    categories: true
language:
  listing-page-field-categories: "Filter by topic keywords"
toc: false    
page-layout: full
footnotes-hover: false
format:
  html:
    anchor-sections: false
---

## Working Papers

::: {#unpublished-papers}
:::
